name: Pasinex Resources Limited
summary: Pasinex Resources Limited acquires, explores for, and develops mineral properties. It holds a 50% interest in the Pinargozu zinc mine; and the Akkaya property located in Adana Province, Turkey. The company also holds an option to acquire 80% interest in the Gunman zinc exploration project in Nevada. Pasinex Resources Limited was incorporated in 2006 and is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
